V-M-062.purpose: Verify Phase-44 email onboarding, password policy, password reset, and duplicate-email UX without changing deploy/install scripts.
V-M-062.checks: Branded email templates render safely, registration copy is accurate, weak passwords are rejected, reset tokens are one-time and TTL-bound, duplicate registration offers recovery, and secrets/tokens remain redacted.

phase-44-gates.gate-1: Verification and reset emails include branded HTML and text fallback while never logging full links or tokens.
phase-44-gates.gate-2: Pending-registration UI tells users to check spam and contains no stale "trial на 3 дня" or immediate VPN claim.
phase-44-gates.gate-3: Strong-password validation is deterministic for registration and reset flows on backend and frontend.
phase-44-gates.gate-4: Password reset request, success, expired, replay, and invalid token states are covered.
phase-44-gates.gate-5: Duplicate-email registration returns a clear account-exists message with reset CTA and no extra side effects.

phase-46-gates.gate-1: Password policy helper exports a format-only example that satisfies the active frontend policy.
phase-46-gates.gate-2: Registration UI displays the example while clearly telling users not to reuse it literally.
phase-46-gates.gate-3: passwordStrengthIssues remains the registration validation gate; backend policy is unchanged.

phase-51-gates.gate-1: Verification and reset HTML emails render the public KrotPN email-logo image from FRONTEND_URL.
phase-51-gates.gate-2: Text fallbacks do not include the email-logo URL and stay focused on one-time action links.
phase-51-gates.gate-3: Email body logo rendering remains separate from provider-side BIMI sender-avatar behavior.

verification-levels.module-local: Email template rendering, password-strength policy, reset token lifecycle, and duplicate-email side-effect guards are tested with deterministic backend assertions.
verification-levels.wave-level: Auth/email/frontend surfaces are verified together so API response shape, UI copy, and provider redaction do not drift.
verification-levels.phase-level: Backend tests, frontend build, static UX smoke, XML parse, MyGRACE lint, and no deploy/install diff guard must all pass before Phase-44 is closed.

scenarios.scenario-1: Strong-password registration sends branded verification email and shows spam-folder guidance.
scenarios.scenario-2: Weak-password registration is rejected before pending registration or provider send side effects.
scenarios.scenario-3: Password reset token changes password once and authenticates with the new password.
scenarios.scenario-4: Expired or replayed reset token cannot change password again.
scenarios.scenario-5: Existing-email registration suggests password recovery without creating duplicate pending access.
scenarios.scenario-6: Verification/reset HTML body contains the public KrotPN logo while token handling and text fallback stay unchanged.

commands.command: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_email_delivery.py tests/test_verified_registration.py tests/test_password_recovery.py tests/test_email_verification_guard.py tests/test_db_migrations.py -v

python3 -m xml.etree.ElementTree docs/plans/Phase-44.xml docs/modules/M-062.xml docs/modules/M-002.xml docs/modules/M-009.xml docs/modules/M-028.xml docs/modules/M-040.xml docs/verification/V-M-062.xml docs/verification/V-M-002.xml docs/verification/V-M-009.xml docs/verification/V-M-028.xml docs/verification/V-M-040.xml docs/graph-index.xml docs/plan-index.xml docs/verification-index.xml docs/requirements.xml docs/current-status.xml

evidence.evidence-1: 2026-06-01: backend Phase-44 auth/email/migration suite passed outside sandbox because sandbox aiosqlite in-memory DB hangs; result was 29 passed in 0.84s.
evidence.evidence-4: 2026-06-01: XML parse and MyGRACE lint passed.
evidence.evidence-5: 2026-06-01: deploy/install diff guard passed by review; no deploy/install files changed.
evidence.evidence-6: 2026-06-01: Phase-46 frontend build and UX smoke passed for safe password format example without backend policy changes.
evidence.evidence-7: 2026-06-02: backend email delivery tests and Phase-51 smoke passed for shared verification/reset action-email logo rendering without text fallback noise or token leaks.

telemetry-requirements.metric-1: Password reset request, success, invalid, expired, and replay outcomes are counted without raw email, token, provider body, or IP leakage.
telemetry-requirements.metric-2: Email provider failures are normalized with provider code/category only; bearer keys, message bodies, and links stay redacted.

redaction.item-1: No verification token, reset token, Resend API key, bearer header, or full verification/reset link may appear in logs, test output, or smoke output.
redaction.item-2: Provider errors are normalized before reaching user-facing responses.

V-M-062.autonomous-execution-safety: Safe for local autonomous execute after explicit user approval because the scope is app/frontend only and excludes deploy/install. Block execution if password reset storage lacks migration coverage, if any token is stored raw, or if duplicate-email handling creates active access side effects.
